meta.description: Mirrors the Myths & Midnight n8n pipeline (Schedule -> ElevenLabs -> MP3), extended to render the Remotion ad. Auto-pulls the voice by name; builds any ad whose scheduledDate == today.
meta.notes: Set env ANANSI_ADS_DIR to the video-ads folder path (mounted into the n8n container). Create an n8n 'Header Auth' credential named 'ElevenLabs API' with header name 'xi-api-key' and your key as the value.
